about.title: About Me
about.summary1: Fullstack developer with experience in React/JavaScript and Java/Spring Boot, focused on quality, collaboration, and impactful deliveries.
about.summary2: I work across frontend and backend, from requirements to delivery, keeping a strong focus on quality and consistency. I follow Clean Code and engineering patterns, support well-grounded technical decisions, reviews, and clear priorities. I bring a collaborative mindset, direct communication, and a commitment to continuous growth within the team.

elevate.description: At elevate, I worked on the fullstack development team, contributing to the evolution of digital products with a focus on quality, UI/API consistency, and continuous delivery.

bullets.techLead: Acted as Tech Lead, driving priorities and technical decisions to ensure high-quality deliveries.
bullets.productEvolution: Built and evolved products, ensuring consistency between UI and APIs with a strong quality focus.
bullets.endToEndImprovements: Delivered end-to-end improvements, reducing rework and increasing delivery predictability.
bullets.architectureBestPractices: Contributed to architecture and best practices, supporting technical decisions and code reviews.
bullets.bugFixes: Partnered with the team to diagnose and fix bugs, preserving stability and user experience.
bullets.fullCycleDelivery: Contributed across the full software lifecycle, evolving to support mentorship and quality standards.
bullets.featuresFrontendBackend: Implemented features and frontend/backend adjustments following solid coding practices.
bullets.reviewsDocumentation: Supported reviews and technical documentation to maintain project continuity.

tech.exploreDefault: Explore the technologies I use to build digital solutions

descriptions.reactnative: Developing mobile applications focused on consistent experience, performance, and component reuse
descriptions.js: Strong command of ES6+, asynchronous programming, DOM manipulation, and REST API integration

descriptions.html: Semantic structure, accessibility, and SEO optimization for high-quality web experiences
descriptions.css: Responsive layouts with Flexbox, Grid, CSS3 animations, and scalable architectures
descriptions.styledcomponents: Component-based styling and visual consistency with scalability and maintainability
descriptions.node: Building RESTful APIs, authentication, middleware, and database integrations
descriptions.python: Process automation, scripting, data analysis, and backend application development

descriptions.springboot: Microservices architecture, REST APIs, Spring Security, and database integration

descriptions.postgresql: Using PostgreSQL for persistence, queries, and business rule support

elevateAuthApi.description: Authentication and authorization platform (Java + Spring Boot) with OAuth2/OpenID Connect and JWT token issuance/validation. Multi-tenant solution by domain, client-specific custom login, scope/permission control, and administrative endpoints, with containerized deployment via Docker.

seatHub.description: Complete coworking platform for booking workspaces. Management system with availability control, hourly/daily/monthly bookings, an admin dashboard, and payments integration. Web and mobile apps with interactive maps.

tapInOut.description: Smart digital time tracking system with facial biometrics and real-time GPS. AI-powered dashboard for overtime alerts, time bank management, and labor risk detection. Advanced security with AES-256 encryption and OAuth2.

buscaCep.description: Web app for postal code lookup integrated with the ViaCEP API. Intuitive interface to search full addresses by postal code, with validation and error handling.

weatherApp.description: Real-time weather forecast app integrated with a weather API. Displays temperature, conditions, and forecasts with a clean, responsive design.

calculator.description: Modern, functional web calculator with a minimalist design. Performs basic math operations with a responsive UI and smooth user experience.
